message.content:
Very thorough exploration of the Application flow in HireLoop. I need to understand:

1. Read `public/job-board.html` completely (where candidates browse/apply)
2. Read `public/recruiter-applications.html` completely (where recruiters view applications)
3. Read `routes/jobs.js` completely (application endpoints)
4. Read `routes/candidate.js` completely
5. Check for any application-related JS files in `public/js/`
6. Check `server.js` for route mounting and any application middleware

I need to understand the current apply flow and where to add pre-screening questions. Give me FULL content of key files.

content.text: I'll conduct a very thorough exploration of the application flow in HireLoop. Let me start by reading all the key files you mentioned.
Now let me read the main.js file which contains critical application helper functions:

Perfect! I now have a comprehensive understanding of the HireLoop application flow. Let me create a detailed report for you. --- ## HIRELOOP APPLICATION FLOW - THOROUGH EXPLORATION I've completed a very thorough exploration of the HireLoop application flow. Here's the complete analysis: ### 1. CANDIDATE APPLY FLOW (PUBLIC/JOB-BOARD.HTML) **File:** `/tmp/polsia-workspaces/company-956/agent-30/exec-53337/hireloop/public/job-board.html` (1,383 lines) **Key Flow:** 1. Candidate loads job board and sees 4 tabs: Recommended, All Jobs, Saved, Applied 2. Jobs are fetched via API: `/candidate/jobs/recommended?limit=30` (line 216) 3. Each job card shows: - Title, company, location, job_type, salary_range - Match score (calculated from candidate's OmniScore and skills) - Save/Unsave functionality 4. Clicking "Apply Now" (line 496) opens the `apply-modal` (lines 139-180) **Apply Modal Details (lines 139-180):** - Shows job title and match preview with match circle - **SCREENING QUESTIONS SECTION** (lines 155-159): ```
📋 Pre-Screening Questions
``` - Cover letter textarea (optional, line 163) - Application checklist (OmniScore, Profile, Skills, Resume) - Submit button calls `submitApplication()` (line 614) **Screening Questions Rendering (lines 562-599):** - Dynamically renders based on `job.screening_questions` array - Supports types: `yes_no`, `select`, `number`, `text` - Marks required questions with red asterisk - For yes_no: Radio buttons (lines 574-578) - For select: Dropdown with options (lines 579-583) - For number/text: Input fields (lines 584-588) **Application Submission (lines 614-671):** ```javascript // Collects screening answers from form fields with pattern: sq_{questionId} const screening_answers = {}; for (const q of questions) { let val; if (q.type === 'yes_no') { const checked = document.querySelector(`input[name="sq_${q.id}"]:checked`); val = checked ? checked.value : ''; } else { const el = document.getElementById(`sq_${q.id}`); val = el ? el.value.trim() : ''; } if (q.required && !val) { alert(`Please answer: "${q.question}"`); return; } screening_answers[q.id] = val; } // POST to /candidate/jobs/{jobId}/apply with body: // { cover_letter, screening_answers } ``` --- ### 2. RECRUITER APPLICATIONS VIEW (PUBLIC/RECRUITER-APPLICATIONS.HTML) **File:** `/tmp/polsia-workspaces/company-956/agent-30/exec-53337/hireloop/public/recruiter-applications.html` (752 lines) **Recruiter Dashboard Shows:** - Applications list with filtering by status (Applied, Reviewing, Interviewed, Offered, Rejected) - Each application card displays: - Candidate name, avatar, job title - OmniScore at time of apply - Application status badge - Contact info (email, applied date, match score) **Screening Answers Display (lines 329-348):** ```javascript // Parse screening answers from database const answers = typeof app.screening_answers === 'string' ? JSON.parse(app.screening_answers || '{}') : (app.screening_answers || {}); const questions = typeof app.screening_questions === 'string' ? JSON.parse(app.screening_questions || '[]') : (app.screening_questions || []); // Renders as: //
//
📋 Screening Answers
//
// ${questions mapped to answer display} //
//
``` **Application Actions:** - Review (line 386) - Schedule Interview (line 389) - Make Offer (line 392) - Reject (line 395) --- ### 3. JOBS API ROUTE (ROUTES/JOBS.JS) **File:** `/tmp/polsia-workspaces/company-956/agent-30/exec-53337/hireloop/routes/jobs.js` (140 lines) **Endpoints:** | Method | Route | Auth | Purpose | |--------|-------|------|---------| | GET | `/` | optionalAuth | List active jobs with pagination | | GET | `/:id` | optionalAuth | Get single job details | | POST | `/` | authMiddleware + requireRole | Create job with screening_questions | | PUT | `/:id` | authMiddleware | Update job (including screening_questions) | | DELETE | `/:id` | authMiddleware | Delete job | **Key: Screening Questions Handling** - **Line 54:** Accepts `screening_questions` in request body - **Line 64:** Stores as JSON: `JSON.stringify(screening_questions || [])` - **Line 107:** Updates screening questions with: `screening_questions = COALESCE($8, screening_questions)` --- ### 4. CANDIDATE API ROUTE (ROUTES/CANDIDATE.JS) **File:** `/tmp/polsia-workspaces/company-956/agent-30/exec-53337/hireloop/routes/candidate.js` (1,070 lines) **Key Application Endpoints:** #### Apply to Job (lines 860-915) ```javascript POST /jobs/:jobId/apply Body: { cover_letter, screening_answers } // Process: 1. Get candidate profile, skills, omniscore 2. Calculate match score for job 3. Insert into job_applications table with: - candidate_id (req.user.id) - job_id - company_id - cover_letter - match_score - omniscore_at_apply - screening_answers (JSON) 4. Returns: { success: true, application } ``` #### Get Applications (lines 918-934) ```javascript GET /applications Returns all applications with: - Job title, company, location, salary - Application status ``` #### Job Matching (lines 748-809) ```javascript GET /jobs/recommended?limit=20 - Fetches candidate profile and skills - Gets all active jobs - Calculates match scores using AI - Returns jobs sorted by match score - Each job includes .match object with: - match_score (0-100) - match_level ('excellent', 'good', 'fair', 'poor') - recommendation - matching_skills - missing_skills ``` **Database Table: job_applications** Stores: - `id`, `candidate_id`, `job_id`, `company_id` - `cover_letter` (text) - `match_score` (integer) - `omniscore_at_apply` (integer) - `screening_answers` (JSON) - `status` (enum) - `applied_at`, `updated_at` (timestamps) --- ### 5. PUBLIC JS FILES **Main JS:** `/tmp/polsia-workspaces/company-956/agent-30/exec-53337/hireloop/public/js/main.js` (521 lines) **Key Functions:** - `apiCall(endpoint, options)` - Lines 244-290: Makes authenticated API calls with auto-token refresh - `checkAuth()` - Lines 57-101: Validates JWT token and loads user - `handleLogout()` - Lines 226-241: Clears tokens and redirects --- ### 6. SERVER SETUP (SERVER.JS) **File:** `/tmp/polsia-workspaces/company-956/agent-30/exec-53337/hireloop/server.js` (86 lines) **Route Mounting:** ```javascript app.use('/api/jobs', jobRoutes); // Line 43 app.use('/api/candidate', candidateRoutes); // Line 46 app.use('/api/recruiter', recruiterRoutes); // Line 52 app.use('/api/onboarding', onboardingRoutes); // Line 67 ``` --- ## CRITICAL FINDINGS: WHERE TO ADD PRE-SCREENING QUESTIONS ### CURRENT IMPLEMENTATION: 1. **Job Creation** (routes/jobs.js, line 54): - Recruiters can set `screening_questions` when creating jobs - Format: Array of question objects with `{id, question, type, required, options, placeholder}` 2. **Candidate Application** (public/job-board.html, lines 562-599): - Questions are dynamically rendered in modal - Answers collected in `screening_answers` object - Sent to backend with application 3. **Answer Storage** (routes/candidate.js, line 908): - Stored as JSON in `job_applications.screening_answers` 4. **Recruiter View** (public/recruiter-applications.html, lines 329-348): - Answers parsed and displayed in grid format - Color-coded for yes/no responses --- ## INTEGRATION POINTS FOR NEW PRE-SCREENING FEATURES: ### Frontend Changes Needed: 1. **Job-Board Modal** - Enhance screening questions rendering (lines 562-599) 2. **Application Submit** - Enhanced validation for screening (lines 633-638) 3. **Recruiter View** - Add filtering/scoring by screening answers (lines 329-348) ### Backend Changes Needed: 1. **Jobs Route** - Validation for screening_questions structure (routes/jobs.js) 2. **Candidate Route** - Screening answer validation before applying (routes/candidate.js, line 862) 3. **Database** - Add columns for screening analytics if needed ### Database Schema Required: - `jobs.screening_questions` (JSON) - Already exists - `job_applications.screening_answers` (JSON) - Already exists - Consider adding: `job_applications.screening_score` (integer) for auto-scoring --- All file paths are absolute and ready for implementation!
